issues.description: Effect array is empty. Card has a triggered ability that must be defined: '[Your Turn] [Once Per Turn] When a card is added to your hand from your Life, this Character gains +2000 power during this turn.'
Missing trigger: should be 'Trigger' (card added to hand from Life)
Missing duration: '[Your Turn]' in text requires duration 'DuringYourTurn'

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Your Turn] [Once Per Turn] When a card is added to your hand from your Life, this Character gains +2000 power during this turn.
